title: Crunchy German-Style Curry Walnut Chicken
description: A flavorful and crunchy chicken dish inspired by German cuisine, with the added spice of curry and crunch of walnuts.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and curry powder.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Sear the chicken breast until browned on both sides.
Transfer the chicken to a baking sheet and bake in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, mix the crispy onions and chopped walnuts in a bowl.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced chicken with the onion-walnut mixture on top and a side of german mustard.
Garnish with additional crispy onions and walnuts, if desired.
